stories.headline: Trump’s tariffs one year on: How Americans are paying the price
stories.description: US households paid $1,000 more for the same goods over the past year, with lower-income families hit the hardest.

stories.headline: Nearly 1,200 children killed or injured in Yemen despite truce: NGO
stories.description: Save the Children says nearly one in two child casualties are due to landmines and explosive remnants of war.

stories.headline: UK to host virtual summit on Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Yvette Cooper is due to convene a virtual meeting of foreign ministers, though the US is not expected to attend.

stories.headline: Mandelson tried to get Epstein’s ‘goddaughter’ access to 10 Downing Street
stories.description: The Epstein files indicate the 15-year-old girl would later meet then-Prince Andrew at Buckingham Palace.

stories.headline: Man dies in Storm Erminio as Saharan dust shrouds Crete
stories.description: A man dies in flooding near Athens as rain lashes several regions in Greece, while a Saharan dust storm enveloped Crete.
